narrative:
North Olmsted-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,098 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
